Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up For Entry Of Default Judgment As To Defendant Franklin R. Buchanan; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Robert A. Wilks And Declarations In Support Thereof; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Dec-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Franklin R. Buchanan.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Lisa Schafer, CSR #12723. Telephone: 530-867-4259. Email: lschafer@sftc.org.

Robert A. Wilks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Amica Mutual Insurance Company.
Mark Carton, Insured Driver and witness for plaintiff Amica Mutual Insurance Company, was placed under oath and testified.
Miriam Hercules, Senior Surogation Specialist for plaintiff Amica Mutual Insurance Company, was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs Wilks, Carton and Ms. Hercules all appeared via ZOOM Video Conference for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Franklin R. Buchanan.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Subrogation; Damages to Personal Property; Personal Injury was filed on June 20, 2019.
Summons, Complaint and Accompanying Documents were Personally Served on defendant Franklin R. Buchanan on July 7, 2019.
Statement of Damages was served on July 7, 2019
Default as to defendant Franklin R. Buchanan was entered on August 22, 2019.
Dismissal without Prejudice as to defendant Ricky Griffith was filed on September 16,2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 6, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Amica Mutual Insurance Company, and against defendant Franklin R. Buchanan, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $42,117.13. (Amount pled in complaint).
Costs - $540.00.

Total - $42,657.13.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
